query: query categoryTopicList($categories: [String!]!, $first: Int!, $orderBy: TopicSortingOption, $skip: Int, $query: String, $tags: [String!]) { categoryTopicList(categories: $categories, first: $first, orderBy: $orderBy, skip: $skip, query: $query, tags: $tags) { totalNum edges { node { id title post { creationDate } tags { slug } } } } }
